error_signature: Safari's Firewall stopped an added NPM
title: Data fetch issue in Safari due to NPM plugin
symptom: The application does not fetch data when opened in Safari, but works fine in Chrome. This issue arose unexpectedly without any republishing.
not_this_if: The application works in other browsers like Chrome
root_cause: Safari's security settings, particularly its firewall, can block certain NPM plugins from functioning correctly, leading to data fetch failures in the browser.
fix_steps: Identify the NPM plugin causing the issue
Remove the problematic plugin from the application
Test the application again in Safari
agent_instruction: Remove the NPM plugin that is being blocked by Safari's Firewall.
